items.title: Contain every manifest-controlled layer path before inspection or mutation.
acceptance: reject traversal and absolute manifest paths
reject paths that resolve to the workspace root
reject symlinks whose canonical target escapes the workspace
accept valid existing and not-yet-existing nested paths
apply one resolver before update, upgrade, remove, inspection, hashing, diff, graph, map, and agent instantiation
prove that force cannot bypass containment
pass package, CLI, packed-artifact, and real Rail integration checks
evidence: test/managed-path.test.js: traversal, absolute, root, missing nested, and symlink containment cases pass
test/cli.test.js: Rail initialization, repair, and invalid-state verification cases pass
npm.cmd run check: self-check passed with 117 assertions on 2026-07-23
npm.cmd run pack:verify: packed artifact self-check passed with 117 assertions on 2026-07-23

extensions.acceptance_result: All acceptance checks passed; the release stop line is cleared.
